SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_LTCP_COINS_1M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was populated 2008–2012 and 2014+. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a 
coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment 
variable called (PRE_ICL_LTCP_COPAY_1M).
